title: MISO LMP Real Time 5 Min Ex Post Prelim JSON API
description:
Preliminary Ex-Post real-time five-minute LMPs in MISO. These are the LMPs calculated automatically in real-time by MISO following the approval of each Unit Dispatch System (UDS) case by the *SCED-Pricing* program.

Ex-Post LMPs may differ from Ex-Ante LMPs depending on fast start and emergency operations resources.

See MISO's *BPM 002 - Energy and Operating Reserves* for additional discussion.
